characterization_tests_existing: backend/tests/models/test_dataset.py:919-1029 (TestQueryPreviewRows — 4 methods covering empty-schema, COPY route + SQL constants, custom-case macros, built-in case modes)

phases.title: Phase 0 — Walking skeleton + port introduced + legacy delegator
phases.scope: Mikado step 1+2+3 (DESIGN §5). (1) Create backend/app/query_engine/{__init__.py, pg_duckdb_adapter.py, exceptions.py}. __init__.py declares the QueryEnginePort Protocol (execute_dataset_query + probe). pg_duckdb_adapter.py implements the Protocol — asyncpg + pg_duckdb + COPY-route + macro registration — by transcribing the body of Dataset.query_preview_rows verbatim (DWD-4 binding: byte-for-byte). exceptions.py declares QueryEngineError + MacroRegistrationError. (2) Add a query_engine lazy slot to RepositoryContainer (backend/app/repositories/__init__.py) per DWD-3. (3) Convert Dataset.query_preview_rows into a thin delegator that imports the adapter and calls it; emit a DeprecationWarning naming QueryEnginePort.execute_dataset_query (DWD-5). (4) MOVE the four-class _FakeConnection ladder + the four TestQueryPreviewRows methods from backend/tests/models/test_dataset.py:837-1029 to a new file backend/tests/query_engine/test_pg_duckdb_adapter.py with the SUT changed from Dataset to PgDuckDBQueryEngineAdapter; rename test methods test_query_preview_rows_* → test_execute_dataset_query_*; preserve the pinned outer/inner SQL constants byte-for-byte (DWD-4 + Iron Rule). (5) Wire the walking-skeleton acceptance scenario green against the running compose stack. Resolve UI-1 from upstream-issues.md by amending ADR-021 + design.md to use execute_dataset_query in the same commit.
scenarios_to_unskip: tests/acceptance/extract-dataset-query-port/walking-skeleton.feature :: Customer's dataset preview is fetched through the new port and matches the legacy SQL shape
tests/acceptance/extract-dataset-query-port/milestone-1-port-extraction.feature :: COPY-from-stdout route is preserved byte-for-byte through the new port
tests/acceptance/extract-dataset-query-port/milestone-1-port-extraction.feature :: Empty-schema dataset short-circuits without touching the connection pool
tests/acceptance/extract-dataset-query-port/milestone-1-port-extraction.feature :: Custom-case transforms register every macro through pg_duckdb's raw_query shim
tests/acceptance/extract-dataset-query-port/milestone-1-port-extraction.feature :: Built-in case modes do not trigger custom macro registration
tests/acceptance/extract-dataset-query-port/milestone-1-port-extraction.feature :: Macros register on the same connection that runs the preview query
tests/acceptance/extract-dataset-query-port/milestone-1-port-extraction.feature :: Sequential previews on the same dataset acquire and release pool connections cleanly
tests/acceptance/extract-dataset-query-port/milestone-1-port-extraction.feature :: Adapter rejects a connection that cannot speak pg_duckdb with a named error

phases.title: Phase 1 — Caller migration: DatasetService -> direct port; legacy delegator parity
phases.scope: Mikado step 4+5 (DESIGN §5). (1) Update DatasetService.__init__ to accept the query_engine alongside metadata_repo (it reads from RepositoryContainer.query_engine via the with_repositories decorator). (2) Update DatasetService.fetch_dataset (line 64 of dataset_service.py) to call self._query_engine.execute_dataset_query(dataset, limit=preview_limit) instead of dataset.query_preview_rows(limit=preview_limit). (3) Migrate test patches in backend/tests/use_cases/dataset/test_get_dataset.py from patch.object(Dataset, 'query_preview_rows', ...) to patching the injected adapter (DESIGN §5 step 5; DWD-3). (4) Verify the legacy method still works by adding the M2 parity scenario green: same Dataset, same limit, same recording connection, identical rows + identical SQL on both invocation paths.
scenarios_to_unskip: tests/acceptance/extract-dataset-query-port/milestone-2-caller-migration.feature :: Legacy method delegates to the new port and produces identical preview rows
tests/acceptance/extract-dataset-query-port/milestone-2-caller-migration.feature :: Legacy method emits a deprecation notice naming the new port
tests/acceptance/extract-dataset-query-port/milestone-2-caller-migration.feature :: Dataset service fetches preview rows through the port, not through the dataset model
tests/acceptance/extract-dataset-query-port/milestone-2-caller-migration.feature :: Dataset service handles a port failure as a named query engine error
phases.files_changed_estimate: backend/app/use_cases/dataset/dataset_service.py — reroute fetch_dataset's preview call through self._query_engine (~15 LOC delta, line 64 area). backend/tests/use_cases/dataset/test_get_dataset.py — migrate patches from Dataset.query_preview_rows to the injected adapter (~30 LOC delta, mechanical). tests/acceptance/extract-dataset-query-port/steps/dataset_query_port_steps.py — replace pytest.fail bodies for 4 M2 scenarios (~70 LOC of step bodies). ~115 LoC.

Reviewer (nw-software-crafter-reviewer) approves: caller is on the port, legacy method retained for one minor release per DWD-5
ac_references: wave-decisions.md DWD-3 (RepositoryContainer is wire-up point), DWD-5 (shim retained for one minor release)

phases.title: Phase 2 — Domain cleanup: remove delegator, add import-linter contracts, add startup probe gold-test
phases.scope: Mikado step 6 (DESIGN §5). (1) DELETE Dataset.query_preview_rows entirely. (2) DELETE Dataset._needs_custom_case_macros (or PROMOTE to public requires_custom_case_macros if any non-port consumer surfaces; current scan: zero non-port consumers, so DELETE is correct). (3) Remove the 'import asyncpg', 'from ..database import get_query_engine_pool', and 'from ..utils.sql_functions import ALL_MACROS' references from backend/app/models/dataset.py (these were already inside the deleted method body in Phase 0; this phase asserts none have crept back). (4) Add import-linter (or pytest-archon) contracts at backend/tests/architecture/test_dependency_rules.py per ADR-021 §Architectural enforcement: (a) app.models.* MUST NOT import asyncpg / app.utils.sql_functions / app.database.get_query_engine_pool, (b) only app.query_engine.* MAY import asyncpg, (c) app.query_engine.* MUST NOT import ibis. (5) Add the behavioral CI gold-test at backend/tests/architecture/test_startup_refused.py: monkeypatch asyncpg.create_pool to raise ConnectionRefusedError, assert the FastAPI startup raises with a structured 'health.startup.refused' event (DWD-10 + ADR-021 §Earned-Trust contract). (6) Promote ADR-021 status from Proposed to Accepted in the same commit (Atlas's design-reviewer pass should already have completed before DELIVER started; if not, BLOCK on Atlas approval).

tests/acceptance/extract-dataset-query-port/milestone-3-domain-cleanup.feature :: The query engine port refuses to start when pg_duckdb is missing

deliver_dispatch_notes.paradigm: Python — frozen-dataclass for Dataset domain model (ADR-005 preserved); Protocol-typed port pattern for QueryEnginePort (mirrors LakeRepository convention per DWD-2 of DESIGN); module-level adapter class for PgDuckDBQueryEngineAdapter (asyncpg owns the I/O; the class is stateless except for the injected pool dependency).
deliver_dispatch_notes.iron_rule: NEVER modify a relocated characterization test to make the refactor green. The pinned outer/inner SQL constants from backend/tests/models/test_dataset.py:963-970, :1003-1004 MUST appear byte-for-byte in backend/tests/query_engine/test_pg_duckdb_adapter.py. If a test would fail under the new shape, the refactor is wrong, not the test (DWD-4 + DESIGN §7 Risk #1). Each phase enables ONE scenario at a time; revert and escalate after 3 failed attempts.
deliver_dispatch_notes.tdd_cycle: RED_ACCEPTANCE → unskip one scenario → RED_UNIT → write failing unit test (or move characterization test) → GREEN → minimum implementation → REFACTOR per RPP L1-L6 → next scenario
context_handoff: ADR-021 (Proposed; promote to Accepted in Phase 02 per Atlas's review)
